name: Backpropagation-Free Test-Time Adaptation for Lightweight EEG-Based Brain-Computer Interfaces
summary: arXiv:2601.07556v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Electroencephalogram (EEG)-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) face significant deployment challenges due to inter-subject variability,...
description: arXiv:2601.07556v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Electroencephalogram (EEG)-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) face significant deployment challenges due to inter-subject variability, signal non-stationarity, and computational constraints. While test-time adaptation (TTA) mitigates distribution shifts under online data streams without per-use calibration sessions, existing TTA appr...
author: Siyang Li, Jiayi Ouyang, Zhenyao Cui, Ziwei Wang, Tianwang Jia, Feng Wan, Dongrui Wu
